summary: P1 GlobalNav and Mobile Inbox Tab testing complete. All 18 features tested and PASSING. GlobalNav appears correctly on /dashboard, /dashboard/*, /notifications, /tickets/:id, and /my-pets. Active states work correctly - Dashboard active on /dashboard/*, /my-pets; Inbox active on /notifications, /notifications?view=archive, /tickets/*. Mobile bottom nav has Inbox tab that routes to /notifications. Labels always visible. No blank screens when switching tabs.

integration_issues.flow: Some notification rows reference non-existent tickets
integration_issues.issue: Clicking certain notifications with TKT-SHOP-* format returns 'Ticket not found'. Error state correctly shows Retry and Close buttons (not blank).

critical_code_review_comments: GlobalNav.jsx correctly implements active state logic for Dashboard (/dashboard, /dashboard/*, /my-pets/*) and Inbox (/notifications, /tickets/*)
GlobalNav labels always visible on mobile - no 'hidden sm:inline' class
MobileNavBar.jsx has Inbox tab at line 77 with data-testid='mobile-nav-inbox' that routes to /notifications
TicketThread.jsx has handleBack() with proper fallback: onClose() → returnTo → navigate(-1) → /mira-demo
Error state shows Retry button (data-testid='retry-load-btn') - never blank rule implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 GlobalNav implementation verified complete. All navigation flows working. Badge count shows 99+ unread. TCK-2026-000040 is a valid test ticket.

verified_features.GlobalNav_on_dashboard_subpages: PASS - Dashboard tab active on /dashboard/* routes
verified_features.GlobalNav_on_tickets_id: PASS - Inbox tab active, GlobalNav present
verified_features.switching_no_blank_screens: PASS - Dashboard ↔ Inbox switching works without blank
verified_features.bell_routes_to_notifications: PASS - Bell click navigates directly (no dropdown)
verified_features.error_state_retry_button: PASS - Error shows Retry and Close buttons
